memoryArtifacts.headline: Lines spoken by Henry Green in Shakespeare's King Richard II
memoryArtifacts.description:
****
KING RICHARD II
He is our cousin, cousin; but 'tis doubt,
When time shall call him home from banishment,
Whether our kinsman come to see his friends.
Ourself and Bushy, Bagot here and Green
Obser …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Final lines from Shakespeare's Richard II prior to the execution of Henry Green

zh.Boughton, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾布頓
zh.Lowick, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可
zh.Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton於1352年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布頓時，他的父親Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench42歲，母親Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge34歲。他於1371年與Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster在英國諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1397年在英國英格蘭被列為member of the king’s council。他去世於1399年7月29日在英國英格蘭布里斯托享年47歲。

zh-hans.Boughton, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾布頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton于1352年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布頓时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench42岁，母亲Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge34岁。他于1371年与Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster在英国諾薩普頓史爾洛維其可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1397年在英国英格兰被列为member of the king’s council。他去世于1399年7月29日在英国英格兰布里斯托享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton was born in 1352, in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench, was 42 and his mother, Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge, was 34. He married Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster in 1371, in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. In 1397, his occupation is listed as member of the king’s council in England, United Kingdom. He died on 29 July 1399, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton est né en 1352, à Boughton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster en 1371, à Lowick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. En 1397, sa profession de son indiquée est member of the king’s council à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 29 juillet 1399, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton 1352 in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench 42 und seine Mutter Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge 34. Er hat 1371 in Lowick, Northamptonshire, England Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1397 ist sein Beruf als member of the king’s council in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. Juli 1399 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton è nato il nel 1352 nel Boughton, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster nel 1371, nel Lowick, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1397, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of the king’s council nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 29 luglio 1399, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Grene of Draytonが1352年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボウトンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Benchは42歳，母Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridgeは34歳であった。1371年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロウィックでLady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminsterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1397年，イギリスイギリスでの職業はmember of the king’s councilと記録されている。彼は1399年7月29日にイギリスイギリスブリストルで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton(이)가 1352년 영국 노르섬프토실르 부그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1371년 영국 노르섬프토실르 로이c크에서 Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1397년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 member of the king’s council이었다. 그는 1399년 7월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.from 26 May 1380 to July 1389: de 26 de maio de 1380 a julho de 1389
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton nasceu em 1352, em Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster em 1371, em Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1397, sua profissão aparece como member of the king’s council em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 29 de julho de 1399, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton родился в 1352 г. в местности боугтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster в 1371 г. в местности лоуикк, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1397 году он работал по профессии member of the king’s council в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 29 июля 1399 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry de Grene of Drayton nació en 1352, en Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine de Drayton of Drayton and Botolph Bridge, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Lady Matilda de Mauduit of Warrminster en 1371, en Lowick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1397, su ocupación registrada era member of the king’s council en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 29 de julio de 1399, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
